children.name: Hotel Quick Checkout Breakfast
children.description: Fast breakfast before checkout. Simple pastries and coffee from hotel lobby. Rushed but necessary.

children.name: CN Tower EdgeWalk
children.description: Thrilling hands-free walk around the outside of CN Tower at 356 meters. Unique bucket-list experience with stunning views. Memorable and unforgettable adventure.

children.name: 360 Restaurant at CN Tower
children.description: Revolving restaurant atop CN Tower with panoramic views. Special occasion dining with Canadian cuisine. Memorable farewell lunch.

children.name: Airport Snack Stop
children.description: Generic airport food and coffee before boarding. Forgettable but necessary. Nothing special about airport dining.

children.name: YYZ Departure
children.description: Flight departure from Toronto Pearson International Airport. End of trip.

children.name: Quick Grab Coffee
children.description: Fast coffee and pastry from Tim Hortons. Rushed morning before intense work day.

children.name: Full-Day Workshop
children.description: Intensive all-day work workshop with the entire team. Exhausting but productive session covering project roadmap and deliverables.

children.name: Bloor Street Shopping
children.description: Optional shopping trip along Bloor-Yorkville luxury district. High-end boutiques and designer stores.

children.name: Lee Restaurant
children.description: Susur Lee's flagship Asian fusion restaurant. Creative dishes blending East and West. Trendy atmosphere with innovative cuisine.

children.name: Hotel Continental Breakfast
children.description: Quick breakfast at the hotel restaurant. Simple continental options, nothing special but convenient.

children.name: Stakeholder Presentation
children.description: Morning work session presenting quarterly results to stakeholders. High-pressure meeting requiring focus and preparation.

children.name: Art Gallery of Ontario
children.description: World-class art museum with Canadian and international collections. Indoor cultural experience in Frank Gehry-designed building. Quiet and contemplative atmosphere.

children.name: FRANK Restaurant at AGO
children.description: Modern Canadian cuisine inside the Art Gallery. Artistic setting with creative seasonal menu.

children.name: Pai Northern Thai
children.description: Popular Thai restaurant known for authentic northern Thai cuisine. Lively atmosphere with bold flavors. Asian food option.

children.name: Fran's Restaurant
children.description: Classic Toronto diner serving breakfast all day. Casual and unpretentious with hearty portions.

children.name: Royal Ontario Museum
children.description: World-renowned museum showcasing art, culture, and natural history. Indoor cultural experience with dinosaurs, gems, and world cultures exhibits.

children.name: Eataly Toronto
children.description: Italian marketplace and restaurant in Manulife Centre. Indoor dining with fresh pasta, pizza, and espresso. Great for rainy day lunch.

children.name: Distillery District Walk
children.description: Historic pedestrian village with cobblestone streets, artisan shops, and galleries. Outdoor walking experience through restored Victorian industrial architecture.

children.name: Cluny Bistro
children.description: French-inspired bistro in the Distillery District. Romantic and intimate atmosphere with classic dishes and excellent wine list.

children.name: Mildred's Temple Kitchen
children.description: Popular brunch spot in Liberty Village. Famous for pancakes and weekend atmosphere. Trendy and casual.

children.name: Client Check-in Call
children.description: Remote video call with client to discuss project status. Light work commitment from hotel room.

children.name: Email Catch-up Block
children.description: Dedicated time_block to respond to accumulated work emails. Optional but recommended to stay on top of inbox.

children.name: Networking Drinks
children.description: Casual drinks with industry contacts at a downtown bar. Work-adjacent networking opportunity.

children.name: Kaiseki Kaji
children.description: Exquisite Japanese kaiseki dining experience. Very expensive omakase with seasonal courses. Intimate and formal setting.
